category_sources: Official Flye README says Flye is a de novo assembler for PacBio and Oxford Nanopore reads.
source_facts.description says it is a de novo assembler for single molecule sequencing reads using repeat graphs.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository heading and README use Flye assembler.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Flye GitHub repository.
docs_sources: Official Flye README has a Manuals section linking installation, usage, and FAQ.
Official Flye repository contains the docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/mikolmogorov/Flye, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Flye README mentions PacBio, Oxford Nanopore, metagenome assembly, and repeat graphs.
source_facts.description identifies de novo assembly and repeat graphs.
